Activity tracking and management in Pebble firmware, including algorithms, metrics, insights, and utilities.

## Folders
- **[docs](docs/README.md)**: Documentation of health algorithms for step counting and sleep tracking using accelerometer data and VMC values.
- **[kraepelin](kraepelin/README.md)**: Implements and defines the Kraepelin activity algorithm for data logging, processing, and detection.

## Files
- **[activity.c](activity.c.md)**: Manages activity tracking, including heart rate monitoring, step counting, and sleep data processing, with support for data logging and settings management.
- **[activity.h](activity.h.md)**: Header file for activity tracking in Pebble firmware, defining data structures, constants, and functions for managing activity sessions, preferences, and metrics.
- **[activity_algorithm.h](activity_algorithm.h.md)**: Defines data structures and functions for activity tracking, including minute data logging and sleep detection.
- **[activity_calculators.c](activity_calculators.c.md)**: Functions to compute distance, active calories, and resting calories based on user activity data.
- **[activity_calculators.h](activity_calculators.h.md)**: Functions to compute distance, active calories, and resting calories based on steps, distance, and time.
- **[activity_insights.c](activity_insights.c.md)**: Implements activity insights for Pebble firmware, including notifications and summary pins for sleep and activity sessions.
- **[activity_insights.h](activity_insights.h.md)**: Defines data structures and functions for managing and analyzing activity insights in Pebble firmware.
- **[activity_metrics.c](activity_metrics.c.md)**: Implements functions for managing and retrieving activity metrics, including step count, heart rate, and sleep data.
- **[activity_private.h](activity_private.h.md)**: Defines data structures, constants, and functions for managing activity tracking, including steps, sleep, and heart rate metrics.
- **[activity_sessions.c](activity_sessions.c.md)**: Manages activity sessions, including adding, removing, validating, and logging activities, with a focus on sleep and step activities.
- **[health_util.c](health_util.c.md)**: Functions for formatting and converting health-related data like time durations and distances.
- **[health_util.h](health_util.h.md)**: Utility functions for formatting durations, creating text nodes, and handling distance conversions.
- **[hr_util.c](hr_util.c.md)**: Functions to determine heart rate zones and check if heart rate is elevated.
- **[hr_util.h](hr_util.h.md)**: Defines heart rate zones and functions to determine the zone and elevation status of a given BPM.
- **[insights_settings.c](insights_settings.c.md)**: Manages activity insights settings with default values, file operations, and version control.
- **[insights_settings.h](insights_settings.h.md)**: Defines data structures and functions for managing activity insights settings in firmware.
- **[workout_service.c](workout_service.c.md)**: Implements a workout service for tracking and managing workout sessions, including heart rate and activity data.
- **[workout_service.h](workout_service.h.md)**: Header file for managing workout sessions, including initialization, event handling, and state queries.
